description: CompositionWhite round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with grey fabric tape on inseam of neckline and brand logo embroidered on left chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean You can never go wrong with a classic white t-shirt. Whatever be your mood or occasion, just wear this nike tee with your best blue denims coupled with a smart belt, and look cool and stunning all day.
